description: Phase 008 of the 008 rerank-sidecar arc. Packet 007 found that MPS-Qwen OOMs at spec-memory's 50-doc batch size. This packet adds SPECKIT_RERANK_LOCAL_MAX_DOCS env override and re-benches at cap=10 — the smaller attention buffer should fit on Apple Silicon GPU. PROMOTE iff hit-rate +3, p95 ≤ +500ms, sidecar reach ≥ 95%.
